scripts.push: echo 'DISABLED: drizzle-kit push rewrites the LIVE database schema (drizzle.config targets the resolved DATABASE_URL, which is the shared helium dev DB) and can DROP tables/data. Add a SQL migration in lib/db/migrations/ instead. Disabled after the 2026-06-15 data-loss incident.' && exit 1
scripts.push-force: echo 'DISABLED: drizzle-kit push --force silently DROPS tables on the live DB. Use a SQL migration in lib/db/migrations/ instead. Disabled after the 2026-06-15 data-loss incident.' && exit 1
